parsed.summary: The repository context provided contains only the commit log and diff stat, lacking the actual source code or patch text. A meaningful adversarial review of the new 282-line `scripts/lib/repo-checks.mjs` module and associated changes is impossible without the code. Shipping without a line-by-line review of repo-owning checks is high risk.

findings.title: Missing diff content prevents code review
findings.body: The context includes file names and line counts but omits the actual code changes. The core implementation `scripts/lib/repo-checks.mjs` adds 282 lines of unreviewed logic. Without the diff, correctness, state integrity, and trust boundary checks cannot be evaluated. This is a blind spot that could allow silent failures or security flaws to merge.
findings.recommendation: Provide the full git diff or patch content for the target branch so the code can be reviewed.

validation_signals.artifact: no explicit anchor found near cited lines: scripts/lib/repo-checks.mjs

next_steps: Re-run the review automation with the full git diff output included in the repository context.
Do not merge the branch until the actual implementation has been audited.
